name: Gurgaon Progressive Schools Council
fullName: CBSE Sahodaya Schools Complexes, Gurgaon Chapter
tagline: Rising Together for Excellence in Education
description: A collaborative platform for CBSE schools in Gurugram to share practices, discuss policy, and build stronger learning communities.
activities: Orientation programs, seminars and workshops for teachers, students and principals
Joint programs for examinations, sports, cultural activities and inter-school competitions
Discussion on implementation of circulars and guidelines issued by CBSE
Community development projects on road safety, consumer awareness, peace education and adolescent education
